\documentclass[border=0.5mm]{standalone}

\usepackage{import}
\subimport{../../../}{preamble.tex}

\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{calc}

\usepackage{pgfplots}
\usepgfplotslibrary{fillbetween}

\begin{document}

\begin{tikzpicture}
\begin{axis}[
  width=5.2cm, height=4.8cm, scale only axis,
  xmin=-2, xmax=2, ymin=-1, ymax=3,
  axis lines=box, ticks=none, clip=true,
  view={0}{90},
  colormap={bluered}{color=(blue) color=(red)},
  point meta min=0, point meta max=7,
  axis line style={gray}]

  % Background: surf coloured by ln(f+1), f=(1-x)^2+100(y-x^2)^2  (blue low -> red high)
  \addplot3[surf, shader=interp, samples=55, samples y=55,
            domain=-2:2, y domain=-1:3,
            point meta={ln((1-x)^2+100*(y-x^2)^2 + 1)}] {0};

  % Black contour lines (precomputed level-set branches), at z=1 so they sit on top.
